From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Genus of thrips

| *Kellyia* | |
| --- | --- |
| [Scientific classification](/wiki/Taxonomy_(biology) "Taxonomy (biology)") [Edit this classification](/wiki/Template:Taxonomy/Kellyia "Edit this classification") | |
| Kingdom: | [Animalia](/wiki/Animal "Animal") |
| Phylum: | [Arthropoda](/wiki/Arthropod "Arthropod") |
| Class: | [Insecta](/wiki/Insect "Insect") |
| Order: | [Thysanoptera](/wiki/Thrips "Thrips") |
| Family: | [Phlaeothripidae](/wiki/Phlaeothripidae "Phlaeothripidae") |
| Genus: | *Kellyia* Bagnall, 1929 |

***Kellyia*** is a [genus](/wiki/Genus "Genus") of [thrips](/wiki/Thrips "Thrips") in the family [Phlaeothripidae](/wiki/Phlaeothripidae "Phlaeothripidae").[[1]](#cite_note-1)
